name: mofa-voice
author: hagency
description: ASR and TTS via local Qwen3 models on Apple Silicon (ominix-api)

ominix-api.description: Local inference server for Qwen3 ASR/TTS on Apple Silicon

tools.name: voice_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file to text using local Qwen3 ASR. Supports WAV, OGG, MP3, FLAC, M4A. Use this when you receive a voice message or need to extract text from audio. Returns the transcribed text.

audio_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file to transcribe

tools.name: voice_synthesize
tools.description: Synthesize speech from text using local Qwen3 TTS. Produces a WAV audio file. Use this when the user asks for a voice reply or text-to-speech. After generating, use send_file to deliver the audio to the user.

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech

output_path.description: Path to save the WAV file. Default: /tmp/crew_tts_<timestamp>.wav
